productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Brown Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 33 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 8 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two inner zipped compartments and organiser sleeves for essentialsTwo short handles with one long adjustable and removable strap for carrying easeOne separate pouch inside for all your valuable essentialsOne zipped pocket at the backBranded zips and a magnetic button closure at the mouthBrand name appliqué d on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
